Class RestaurantSettingsController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
public class RestaurantSettingsController extends Object
Controller for managing restaurant settings in the UI. Handles weekly opening hours, special dates, and navigation to the supervisor UI. Communicates with the server via ClientHandler to update, add, or delete settings.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller. Sets up table views, combo boxes, and loads restaurant settings from the server.

    • loadRestaurantSettings

      public void loadRestaurantSettings(RestaurantSettings settings)
      Loads restaurant settings into the tables.
      Parameters:
      settings - the RestaurantSettings object to load

      public void removeDay()
      Removes the selected day from weekly opening hours and updates the server.
